title: Cannot checkpoint podman inside pod
body:
Hi,

I tried to use "podman container checkpoint" the container running on podman's pod

This container create by "sudo podman play kube pod.yml" for more detail: https://developers.redhat.com/blog/2019/01/29/podman-kubernetes-yaml/

It running inside a pod of podman.

I used "podman container checkpoint "
"podman container restore "
It works.

But, the problem is when I tried to export by using "podman container checkpoint -e checkpoiont.tar.gz"

I got error
Error: Cannot export checkpoints of containers with dependencies

How can I fix this? Thank you very much.

BTW, I report this with CRIU. He told me that the problem is podman.

comments.body: This is a limitation of the checkpoint/restore code at the moment. Containers in dependencies (including containers in pods) cannot be exported or imported, as we cannot guarantee the container they depend on will be present.
